query:
SELECT 
  ae.worker_id,
  w.code,
  w.full_name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_in' THEN 1 END) as check_ins,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_out' THEN 1 END) as check_outs
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-03'
GROUP BY ae.worker_id, w.code, w.full_name
HAVING check_ins != check_outs
ORDER BY w.code;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT 
  ae.worker_id,
  w.code,
  w.full_name,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_in' THEN 1 END) as check_ins,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_out' THEN 1 END) as check_outs
FROM attendance_events ae
JOIN workers w ON ae.worker_id = w.id
WHERE DATE(ae.event_time) = '2026-02-03'
GROUP BY ae.worker_id, w.code, w.full_name
HAVING check_ins != check_outs
ORDER BY w.code;
